doc: Worked general-nesting example (ADR-0034): a polyphonic voicer feeding a nested `space` instrument (instruments/patches/space.json) referenced by a `subpatch` node. At build the child inlines under /space (its internals become /space/filter, /space/verb — still OSC-reachable), the node's ports are the child's `interface` names, and the node dissolves: zero runtime cost. Play with /voicer/notes [midi, gate]; shape live via the boundary pipes — /space/tone/in and /space/space/in — or the boundary-set literals here. `reuben describe instruments/patches/space.json` shows the boundary a host wires against.

nodes.doc: The nested tone+reverb effect; `in`/`tone`/`space` are its boundary ports.
